description: Configurable validation rules for data quality checks. Rules affect the Validity dimension score.
rule_types: regex       - value must match regex pattern
range       - numeric value between min and max
enum        - value must be one of allowed values (case-insensitive)
date_format - date must match specified format
length      - string length between min_len and max_len
email       - value must be valid email format
url         - value must be valid URL format
phone       - value must match phone pattern (E.164 or custom)

rules.message: Must be a valid email address
Must be a valid phone number
Status must be one of: active, inactive, pending, suspended
